ZZZ: 2.0 onwards is China done by a team that really obviously did not want to do it
CZN: The independent ark you go to, Yuki generally, very Hong Kong coded
DNA: 1.1-1.3 content is locked to China region with main story on pause (serious risk the game never escapes China before EOS)
Morimens: Xu one-month sidestory during pre-Caraboo lull
Endfield: All of 1.0 content patches will be in China region
My running theory is that it's friendlier to do China-themed content atm
